stat.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos
stat.subtitle: Pinch appearances ending in hit, HBP, HR, or K.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk flies out sharply to center fielder Steven Kwan.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling grounds out, shortstop Nicky Lopez to first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.label: Josh Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Rojas strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández flies out to right fielder Jake McCarthy. Xavier Edwards to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Joey Ortiz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joey Ortiz flies out to right fielder Noelvi Marte.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar singles on a line drive to center fielder Andy Pages. Samad Taylor scores. Manny Machado to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín singles on a line drive to left fielder Mauricio Dubón. Blaze Jordan to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo walks.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez lines out to left fielder Gavin Sheets.

notableEvents.label: JJ Bleday pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: JJ Bleday strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan triples (1) on a line drive to left fielder Josh Smith.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling lines out to center fielder José Caballero.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews walks.

notableEvents.label: Kameron Misner pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kameron Misner reaches on a fielder's choice. Jac Caglianone to 2nd. Jac Caglianone advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Richie Palacios.

notableEvents.label: Joe Mack pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joe Mack hits an inside-the-park home run (6) on a sharp fly ball to right-center field.

notableEvents.label: Jared Triolo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo hit by pitch. Ryan O'Hearn scores. Nick Gonzales to 3rd. Jake Mangum to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín flies out to left fielder Mauricio Dubón.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field. Daulton Varsho scores. Alejandro Kirk scores.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. singles on a line drive to left fielder Nate Eaton. Drew Millas scores. James Wood scores. Curtis Mead to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Cardinals challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Mike Yastrzemski grounds out, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Blaze Jordan.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Matt McLain pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt McLain flies out to right fielder Sal Frelick.

notableEvents.label: Brayan Rocchio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio grounds out, second baseman Cam Cauley to first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.label: Brian Navarreto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brian Navarreto flies out to center fielder Cole Carrigg.

notableEvents.label: Luke Keaschall pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luke Keaschall strikes out swinging.
